{"step_by_step_thinking": "The cotton applied to the pulpal stumps in the formocresol pulpotomy technique should be slightly dampened with formocresol. This is because formocresol needs to be in close contact with the pulp to effectively perform its disinfectant and cauterizing properties. If the cotton is saturated, it could absorb too much formocresol and reduce its effectiveness. Leaving it for 2 hours or sealing until the next appointment is not a standard practice in this technique.", "answer_choice": "A"}
